texto: With insufferable vanity had she believed herself in the secret of everybody's feelings
autor: with unpardonable arrogance proposed to arrange everybody's destiny. She was proved to have been universally mistaken
explicacao: Citação de with unpardonable arrogance proposed to arrange everybody's destiny. She was proved to have been universally mistaken sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “With insufferable vanity had she believed herself in the secret of everybody's feelings” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
